results.rendered_html:
adhiguṇa a. [adhikā guṇā yasya]
1 Possessing superior qualities, worthy, meritorious; yācñā moghā varamadhiguṇe nādhame labdhakāmā  Me. 6. 
2 [adhigato guṇo jyā yena] well strung (as a bow); ˚śarāsanaṃ janāḥ  Ki. 12. 14. 
— ṇaḥ A superior or eminent merit.
